name: Thai Satays
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: PREPARE MEAT
Cut the beef fillet into slices, then cut the slices into thin strips and thread onto bamboo skewers.
STEP TWO: PREPARE MARINADE
Mix the marinade ingredients together in a shallow dish. Place the satays in the marinade and turn occasionally to coat all sides. Marinade for at least 2 hours.
STEP THREE: TO MAKE SAUCE
Fry the curry paste in a frying pan until aromatic, then add coconut cream. Heat well and stir in peanut butter until fully combined.
STEP FOUR: TO COOK SATAYS
Grill the satays on the barbecue, turning once. They should take only a few minutes to cook through.
Serve with sauce.
